opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: It feels like my chest and back are physically tearing apart from the inside, and the pain is unbearable.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Sudden, excruciating tearing chest pain radiating through to the back, in a young man with a known connective-tissue disorder.

symptom_narrative.onset: sudden and maximal right at the onset
symptom_narrative.duration: relentless since it started, not letting up
symptom_narrative.character: a severe tearing/ripping pain, as if tearing apart from the inside
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: unbearable - he is writhing in agony and cannot stay still
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: central chest radiating straight through to between the shoulder blades in the back
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since sudden onset; not affected by movement or breathing
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: nothing specific - it is unrelenting and not positional or pleuritic
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: profoundly lightheaded and nauseous; denies that the pain changes with breathing
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: was independent; now on the floor in agony, unable to stay still

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a genetic connective-tissue disorder (Marfan syndrome) with joint hypermobility and a dislocated lens in the eye; told he has an enlarged aortic root
past_medical_history.how_managed: prescribed beta-blockers for the enlarged aorta but admits poor compliance

family_history_as_reported.narrative: known genetic connective-tissue disorder (Marfan) - family/genetic background relevant

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives with a roommate who is present

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: in extreme pain and frightened; needs immediate help

communication_style.typical_message_style: can barely talk through the pain; roommate relaying and assisting
